tools.name: get_customer
tools.description: Fetch a single Autumn customer by id, optionally expanding related data (invoices, entities, subscriptions, balances). Autumn API: POST /v1/customers.get.

tools.name: list_customers
tools.description: List/filter customers with cursor pagination. Autumn API: POST /v1/customers.list. Returns { list, next_cursor }.

tools.name: check
tools.description: READ-ONLY entitlement check: does a customer have access to (or enough balance of) a feature? Autumn API: POST /v1/balances.check. This tool never records usage — it does not expose send_event or lock.

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List invoices with cursor pagination and optional filters. Autumn API: POST /v1/invoices.list. Returns { list, next_cursor }.

tools.name: get_entity
tools.description: Fetch a single entity (e.g. a seat) belonging to a customer. Autumn API: POST /v1/entities.get.

tools.name: list_entities
tools.description: List a customer's entities with cursor pagination and optional filters. Autumn API: POST /v1/entities.list. Returns { list, next_cursor }.

tools.name: list_features
tools.description: List all features in the current environment. Autumn API: POST /v1/features.list. Returns { list }.

tools.name: get_feature
tools.description: Fetch a single feature by id. Autumn API: POST /v1/features.get.

tools.name: list_plans
tools.description: List all plans (products) in the current environment. Autumn API: POST /v1/plans.list. Returns { list }.

tools.name: get_plan
tools.description: Fetch a single plan by id (optionally a specific version). Autumn API: POST /v1/plans.get.

tools.name: preview_attach
tools.description: Preview the cost/effect of attaching a plan to a customer WITHOUT charging or changing anything. Read-only. Autumn API: POST /v1/billing.preview_attach.

tools.name: autumn_request
tools.description: Power-user escape hatch: POST to any Autumn read/preview endpoint not wrapped by a dedicated tool. READ-ONLY — the path is validated to only allow .get / .list / .check / .preview_* actions; write actions are rejected. Autumn API: POST {path}.

tools.name: get_or_create_customer
tools.description: MUTATES Autumn billing data — fetches a customer by id, creating them if they do not exist. Autumn API: POST /v1/customers.get_or_create.

tools.name: update_customer
tools.description: MUTATES Autumn billing data — partially updates a customer. Only provided fields change. Autumn API: POST /v1/customers.update.

tools.name: track_usage
tools.description: MUTATES Autumn billing data — records a usage event (deducts/credits a feature balance). Provide EITHER feature_id OR event_name. Autumn API: POST /v1/balances.track.

tools.name: attach_plan
tools.description: MUTATES Autumn billing data — attaches (subscribes) a plan to a customer; may create an invoice / return a payment URL. Autumn API: POST /v1/billing.attach. Returns { customer_id, invoice, payment_url, required_action }.

tools.name: create_entity
tools.description: MUTATES Autumn billing data — creates an entity (e.g. a seat) under a customer, tied to a feature. Autumn API: POST /v1/entities.create.

tools.name: open_customer_portal
tools.description: MUTATES Autumn billing data — creates a Stripe billing-portal session for a customer to manage their subscription. Autumn API: POST /v1/billing.open_customer_portal. Returns { customer_id, url }.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_customer, list_customers, check, list_invoices, get_entity, list_entities, list_features, get_feature, list_plans, get_plan, preview_attach, autumn_request, get_or_create_customer, open_customer_portal · Private data: check, track_usage · Public sink: get_customer, list_customers, check, list_invoices, get_entity, list_entities, list_features, get_feature, list_plans, get_plan, preview_attach, autumn_request, get_or_create_customer, update_customer, track_usage, attach_plan, create_entity, open_customer_portal.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_customer, list_customers, check, list_invoices, get_entity, list_entities, list_features, get_feature, list_plans, get_plan, preview_attach, autumn_request, get_or_create_customer, open_customer_portal · Private data: check, track_usage · Public sink: get_customer, list_customers, check, list_invoices, get_entity, list_entities, list_features, get_feature, list_plans, get_plan, preview_attach, autumn_request, get_or_create_customer, update_customer, track_usage, attach_plan, create_entity, open_customer_portal

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
